description: LFG v2.2 - Full UI/Menubar action parity, bidirectional state sync, and missing command panels

userStories.title: BTAU command panel - add all missing menubar actions
userStories.description: As a user viewing the BTAU module in WebKit, I want action buttons for Migrate, Auto-Move (dry/execute), Backup Now, Restore, Rebuild Forest, New Project, and Configuration so I can perform all BTAU operations without switching to the menubar.
acceptanceCriteria: btau.sh command panel includes: Migrate, Auto-Move Dry Run, Auto-Move Execute, Backup Now, Restore, Rebuild Forest, New Project, Configuration
Each button uses LFG.actionButton() with appropriate confirm dialogs for destructive operations
Destructive operations (Rebuild Forest, Auto-Move Execute) use LFG.confirm()
Non-destructive operations (Status, Discover, Config) use LFG.exec()
Button layout matches existing command panel grid style

userStories.title: STFU command panel - add individual analysis mode buttons
userStories.description: As a user viewing the STFU module in WebKit, I want buttons for each individual analysis mode (deps, fingerprint, duplicates, libraries, envs) so I can run targeted analyses without using the CLI.
acceptanceCriteria: STFU view includes command panel with: Dependency Analysis, File Fingerprinting, Duplicate Detection, Library Candidates, Environment Groups
Each button runs the corresponding lfg stfu subcommand via LFG.exec()
Results refresh the STFU view after completion
Full Analysis (Dry Run) and Full Analysis (Execute) buttons also present

userStories.title: DTF command panel - add Docker and Sudo clean options
userStories.description: As a user viewing the DTF module in WebKit, I want Clean+Docker, Clean+Sudo, and Nuclear (all flags) buttons so I have the same cleanup options available in the menubar.
acceptanceCriteria: DTF command panel adds: Clean + Docker, Clean + Sudo, Nuclear (--force --docker --sudo)
Docker and Sudo options use LFG.confirm() with clear warning messages
Nuclear option has a distinct visual treatment (red/danger styling)
Existing Scan Only and Clean All buttons remain unchanged

userStories.title: DEVDRIVE command panel - add auto-move and config
userStories.description: As a user viewing the DevDrive module in WebKit, I want Auto-Move (dry/execute) and Show Config buttons matching the menubar actions.
acceptanceCriteria: DevDrive command panel adds: Auto-Move (Dry Run), Auto-Move (Execute), Show Config
Auto-Move Execute uses LFG.confirm()
Show Config displays output inline or in a modal
Existing Mount/Unmount/Sync/Verify/Create buttons remain unchanged

userStories.title: Graph interval selector in Settings UI panel
userStories.description: As a user, I want to configure the menubar disk graph interval from the Settings UI panel, and have it persist to settings.yaml.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings panel (both dashboard side panel and native sheet) includes Graph Interval selector
Options: 1 min, 5 min, 15 min, 30 min (matching menubar)
Selection persists to ~/.config/lfg/settings.yaml as graph_interval key
Menubar reads graph_interval from settings.yaml on launch and refresh

userStories.title: APM Monitor link in WebKit UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want an APM Monitor link in the splash screen footer and dashboard so I can access the CCEM APM dashboard without the menubar.
acceptanceCriteria: Splash screen footer includes APM link (already partially exists)
Dashboard header or side panel includes APM Monitor button
Link opens http://localhost:3031 in default browser via LFG.exec('open http://localhost:3031')
Visual indicator shows APM status (green dot if reachable)

userStories.title: Bidirectional IPC between menubar and viewer
userStories.description: As a user, I want the menubar and viewer to stay in sync - menubar actions should trigger UI refresh, and UI settings changes should update the menubar without manual refresh.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement DistributedNotificationCenter IPC between menubar.swift and viewer.swift
When menubar triggers a module action, post notification that viewer observes to auto-refresh
When viewer changes settings, post notification that menubar observes to rebuild menu
Both processes watch state.json (already implemented) but also respond to explicit IPC signals
Graph interval changes in UI propagate to menubar timer immediately

userStories.title: Menubar AI submenu enhancements
userStories.description: As a user, I want the menubar AI submenu to include analyze, compare, and suggest subcommands so I can trigger AI operations from the menubar.
acceptanceCriteria: AI menubar submenu adds: Analyze (prompts for path), Compare, Suggest
Analyze opens the viewer to the AI side panel with results
Compare and Suggest fire corresponding lfg ai subcommands
Existing Show Config and Test Connection items remain
